meaning: n.<美口>(西部电影等中英雄和恶棍一决雌雄前)(面对面的)慢慢走近
examples: Abstract: the plant walkdown is an important part of the Seismic Safety Assessment.
The results of plant walkdown must be included in the seismic fragility assessment of structures, systems, and components.
By plant walkdown, the assessment team can develop vital information about the plant configuration, specific spatial relationships, and other features that cannot be found any other way.
